# Toggle

A compound toggle button component that can be pressed or unpressed. Useful for binary state controls like bold/italic formatting buttons, view mode switches, or favorite/bookmark toggles.

## Import

```jsx
import { Toggle, ToggleIndicator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Components

### Toggle (Root)

The root toggle button. Wraps `ChakraToggle.Root`.

#### Toggle Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pressed` | `boolean` | - | Controlled pressed state |
| `defaultPressed` | `boolean` | `false` | Initial pressed state for uncontrolled usage |
| `onPressedChange` | `(pressed: boolean) => void` | - | Callback when the pressed state changes |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline" \| "ghost" \| "plain"` | `"outline"` | The visual style variant |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the toggle button |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the toggle |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The toggle button content |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### ToggleIndicator

Renders different content depending on whether the toggle is pressed or not. Wraps `ChakraToggle.Indicator`.

When the toggle is pressed, it renders its `children`. When the toggle is not pressed, it renders the `fallback` content.

#### ToggleIndicator Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fallback` | `React.ReactNode` | - | Content to render when the toggle is **not** pressed |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | Content to render when the toggle **is** pressed |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Toggle>
  <LuBold />
</Toggle>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);

<Toggle pressed={pressed} onPressedChange={setPressed}>
  <LuStar />
</Toggle>
```

### Uncontrolled

```jsx
<Toggle defaultPressed={true}>
  <LuPin />
</Toggle>
```

### With text

```jsx
<Toggle>
  <LuBold /> Bold
</Toggle>
```

### With ToggleIndicator

Use `ToggleIndicator` to show different content based on the pressed state. The `children` are shown when pressed, and the `fallback` is shown when not pressed.

```jsx
<Toggle>
  <ToggleIndicator fallback={<LuVolume2 />}>
    <LuVolumeX />
  </ToggleIndicator>
</Toggle>
```

### ToggleIndicator with text

You can use multiple `ToggleIndicator` components inside a single `Toggle` to swap both icons and text.

```jsx
<Toggle>
  <ToggleIndicator fallback={<LuVolume2 />}>
    <LuVolumeX />
  </ToggleIndicator>
  <ToggleIndicator fallback="Mute">
    Unmute
  </ToggleIndicator>
</Toggle>
```

### Formatting toolbar example

```jsx
<Group>
  <Toggle aria-label="Bold">
    <LuBold />
  </Toggle>
  <Toggle aria-label="Italic">
    <LuItalic />
  </Toggle>
  <Toggle aria-label="Underline">
    <LuUnderline />
  </Toggle>
</Group>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern with `Toggle` (root) and `ToggleIndicator` (conditional content)
- `ToggleIndicator` renders children when pressed and fallback when not pressed
- Supports both controlled and uncontrolled pressed state
- Visually indicates the pressed/active state
- Supports multiple variants and sizes
- Works well in button groups for toolbar patterns
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM elements
- Includes accessible ARIA attributes for toggle behavior
